title: Package Design, Modules, Versions, Workspaces, and Dependency Provenance · Runtime Contract: Dependency Provenance Upgrades
summary: A team must split a command and library, publish a stable module, test a two-module workspace, and review dependency changes. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go dependency provenance upgrades increment in a versioned multi-package module plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Review direct and transitive dependency additions, version upgrades, licenses, checksums, vulnerability evidence, and rollback.
Use go.work for local multi-module development while proving builds remain correct outside the workspace.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
